Residential Stucco in Hays County, TX

Hays County is growing fast, with new neighborhoods spreading across Kyle, Buda, and San Marcos while Hill Country communities like Dripping Springs and Wimberley attract custom home builders. Star Stucco of Austin installs residential stucco systems that match the character of each community and hold up to Central Texas conditions.

Get a Free EstimateCall (512) 706-9699

Stucco That Fits Hays County's Diverse Communities

Hays County bridges the Austin metro and the rural Hill Country. Along the I-35 corridor, Kyle and Buda are experiencing some of the fastest residential growth in Texas, with master-planned communities going up at a rapid pace. To the west, Dripping Springs and Wimberley offer a more rural setting where custom homes sit on larger lots surrounded by cedar, live oak, and limestone outcroppings.

This variety means residential stucco projects in Hays County range widely — from production-home installations on tight subdivision lots to custom finishes on sprawling Hill Country estates. We adapt our approach for each setting, adjusting material selection, texture style, and scheduling to match the project context.

The county's mix of clay and limestone soils, combined with hot summers and heavy spring rains, demands a stucco system that flexes with the ground and sheds water reliably. Our reinforced details and moisture-management practices address these conditions directly.

What's Included With Our Residential Stucco in Hays County

Every project includes expert craftsmanship, quality materials, and a commitment to lasting results.

Comprehensive Exterior Assessment

We inspect substrate condition, drainage patterns, and existing finishes to plan a stucco system that addresses the specific needs of your Hays County home.

Prep & Weather Barrier

Old finishes are removed or treated, substrates are cleaned, and a code-compliant weather-resistive barrier is installed to manage moisture throughout the wall assembly.

Lath & Scratch Coat

Galvanized lath is fastened per specification, then a scratch coat is applied and keyed. Control joints are placed at stress points to prevent future cracking.

Brown Coat Application

The brown coat brings the surface to the correct profile and is carefully floated for a uniform base that ensures consistent finish texture.

Finish Coat & Detailing

Your selected texture and color are applied by hand. We pay special attention to window returns, trim transitions, and other details that make the finish look polished.

Site Cleanup & Warranty

All materials, equipment, and debris are removed. We walk the completed project with you and provide warranty documentation.

Common Residential Stucco Needs in Hays County

From fast-growing suburbs to custom Hill Country builds, Hays County homeowners trust us with a wide range of residential stucco projects.

Production Home Stucco

Builders in the Kyle, Buda, and San Marcos corridors choose us for efficient, high-quality stucco installations that keep pace with construction schedules without sacrificing finish quality.

Custom Home Finishing

Dripping Springs and Wimberley homeowners building custom residences deserve finishes tailored to their architectural plans. We collaborate with designers to deliver unique textures and colors.

Exterior Renovation

Older Hays County homes with dated siding or deteriorating stucco benefit from a full re-stucco that modernizes the exterior and improves weather protection.

Crack Mitigation on Expansive Soil

The black clay found in parts of eastern Hays County shrinks and swells dramatically. We use reinforced lath and flexible basecoats to absorb this movement without surface cracking.

Curb Appeal Enhancements

Whether you are selling or simply want a refreshed look, a new stucco finish dramatically improves a home's street presence in any Hays County neighborhood.

Accent Walls & Partial Stucco

Not every home needs full stucco coverage. We also apply stucco accents to entryways, chimneys, and gable ends for a distinctive mixed-material exterior.

Why Choose Us for Residential Stucco in Hays County?

  • Active in Hays County communities from San Marcos to Dripping Springs
  • Systems that handle both clay soils along I-35 and limestone terrain in the Hill Country
  • Direct, honest communication about scope, timeline, and cost
  • Neat, professional crews accustomed to both subdivision and rural job sites
  • Durable finishes with UV-stable color that resists Central Texas fade
  • Free on-site estimates — no obligation and no sales pressure

Licensed & Insured

Full liability coverage and workers' compensation for every project in Hays County.

20+ Years Experience

Decades of hands-on stucco work across Central Texas residential and commercial properties.

Certified Applicators

Certified by Sto Corp, Senergy/BASF, Master Wall, Dryvit, and Parex LaHabra for the highest quality results.

Our Residential Stucco Process

A straightforward approach from start to finish — no surprises, no shortcuts.

1

Contact Us

Call (512) 706-9699 or fill out our form online. We will schedule a convenient time to visit your Hays County property.

2

Inspect Your Home

Our estimator walks your exterior, evaluates conditions, and discusses your finish preferences and project goals.

3

Review the Estimate

You receive a detailed, written proposal with line items for materials, labor, timeline, and warranty — everything in plain language.

4

Complete the Work

We install the stucco system from start to finish, maintain daily communication, and present the final result for your approval.
